sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10564" key="a)ntisxhmatismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισχηματ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n10564.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the use of such figures in turn,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
